description: As an administrator (username: admin, password: admin), create a new assignment in the "BIO 101: Introduction to Biology" (BIO101) course site in Sakai at http://localhost:8080/portal. Navigate to the BIO101 course site, open the Assignments tool, and create an assignment with the following details: Title: "Midterm Research Paper: Cell Biology", Open Date: today's date, Due Date: two weeks from today, Accept Until: three weeks from today, Student Submissions: Inline and Attachments, Grade Scale: Points with max grade 100. In the assignment instructions, include: "Write a 5-7 page research paper on a topic related to cell biology. Choose one of the following topics: (1) The role of mitochondria in cellular energy production, (2) Cell membrane structure and transport mechanisms, (3) The cell cycle and its regulation, (4) Stem cells and their therapeutic potential. Your paper must include at least 5 peer-reviewed references in APA format. Submit both an inline text summary and the full paper as a PDF attachment."
